title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!
